title: Login Page - Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) Support
user_stories: As a content admin, I want to authenticate with multi-factor authentication (MFA) when logging into the AEM author instance, so that my account is more secure
As a QA engineer, I want to verify MFA flow works across different authentication methods (OTP, TOTP, SMS)
acceptance_criteria: Given a user with MFA enabled, when entering valid credentials, the system should prompt for a second factor (OTP, TOTP, or SMS)
Given the MFA prompt is displayed, the user should be able to enter the MFA code in a dedicated input field
Given a valid MFA code is entered, the user should be logged in successfully
Given an invalid MFA code is entered, an error message should be displayed and the user should remain on the MFA prompt
Given the MFA timeout is exceeded (5 minutes), the user should be redirected to the login page
Given the user selects 'Use backup code', an alternative input field should be displayed
Given a valid backup code is entered, the user should be logged in successfully
Given the user clicks 'Can\'t access your authenticator', a recovery option should be displayed
technical_requirements: MFA component should be rendered as a modal overlay over the login page
MFA input should mask characters after input (security)
Store MFA device fingerprint for remembering device for 30 days
Integrate with Adobe IMS API for MFA validation
non_functional_requirements: Must meet WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility requirements for form inputs and error messages
Should work across all responsive breakpoints (mobile, tablet, desktop)
MFA flow must complete within 3 seconds (validation + response)
Must support light and dark theme variants
Must support browser autofill for OTP codes (HTML5 autocomplete=one-time-code)
raw_description:
Add Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) support to the GA login page. Users with MFA enabled should be prompted for a second authentication factor after entering their credentials. The MFA flow should support TOTP, SMS OTP, and backup codes.

Design: https://www.figma.com/file/mfa-design/login-mfa-flow

Key features:
- TOTP and SMS OTP support
- Backup code option
- Device remembering (30 days)
- 5-minute MFA session timeout
- Modal overlay on login page
- Full accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA)
- Light/dark theme support
